title: Cam Shaft Mechanism DIY Ventilator
description: Mechanically-driven emergency ventilator using an eccentric cam on a DC gear motor shaft to compress a self-reinflating silicone bellows, delivering 500 mL tidal volume at 12–20 breaths/min.
objective: Tidal volume 500 mL; rate 12–20 BPM adjustable; I:E ratio 1:2; PEEP valve 5 cmH₂O; Arduino RPM control and alarm.
constraints: 12 V battery operation; DC gear motor 12–20 RPM; BOM < ₹5000; single-cam single-bellows design.
supporting_fact_titles: Cam and Follower Mechanism — Displacement Profiles
design_element_titles: Camshaft Bellows Ventilator — Cam-Follower Respiratory Drive
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Camshaft Bellows Ventilator — Cam-Follow: 50 mm eccentric cam; 500 mL silicone bellows; asymmetric cam for 1:2 I/E ratio.
element_usage_notes.DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control: 12–20 RPM = BPM; Arduino potentiometer sets target RPM via PWM.
